requirements.title: cfusa init creates .fusa.json
cfusa init --help returns zero
cfusa check runs on source directory
cfusa release --help returns zero
cfusa release generates SBOM
cfusa qualify --help returns zero
cfusa qualify checks tool binary
cfusa safety-case generates safety case document
cfusa sign --help returns zero
cfusa iso26262 generates gap report
cfusa iec61508 generates gap report
cfusa misra generates MISRA-C coverage report
cfusa audit-pack bundles evidence artifacts
cfusa diff compares two check reports
cfusa badge generates compliance badge
HARA file must be present for ISO 26262 compliance
Hazard risk ratings must be complete
Each hazard must have a safety goal
Safety goals must have ASIL assigned
Hazard max ASIL must not exceed project ASIL
cfusa hara init creates skeleton file
cfusa hara show displays hazard entries
cfusa hara asil computes ASIL from S/E/C
ASIL table follows ISO 26262-3:2018 Table 4
Engine registers rules up to CFUSA_MAX_RULES
Engine runs all registered rules
Engine can run rules by category
Engine lists all registered rules
Engine reset clears all registered rules
L001 detects function length violations
A001 detects dangerous string functions
A002 detects unchecked malloc return
cfusa iso21434 generates CAL-aware gap report
cfusa iec62443 generates SL-aware gap report
iec62443 objectives use canonical §9.3 shape
iec62443 covered/gap/gap-recommended statuses
iec62443 invalid SL returns exit code 2
COUP001 detects data coupling (extern mutable vars)
COUP002 detects control coupling (fn pointer params)
COUP003 warns when coupling-report.json absent
DISP001 warns on undispositioned ERROR findings
COMP001 detects cyclomatic complexity violations
Watchdog provides kick-based timeout monitoring
Heartbeat provides periodic beat health checking
SafeState provides formal state machine transitions
DiagManager provides bounded ring of diagnostic events
FaultMonitor provides per-fault counter with threshold callbacks
cfusa req import parses DOORS ReqIF XML
cfusa req import parses Codebeamer XML
cfusa req import parses Jama XML
cfusa req import parses Polarion XML
cfusa coverage --dal validates DAL level
cfusa coverage DAL-D applies no threshold
cfusa metrics record auto-collects from project artifacts
cfusa metrics show supports --format json --output
JSON location emits endLine+endColumn when set
JSON location omits span fields when end_line is zero
SARIF region includes endLine/endColumn when set
capabilities commands array lists slsa
capabilities standards array lists slsa
capabilities --output writes JSON to file
capabilities lists all implemented commands including verify/metrics/comp/impact/hooks/badge/template
finding.category must be in spec §4 closed enum (lint/safety/security/coverage/requirement/concurrency/supply-chain/config/other)
check --no-summary suppresses SUMMARY/TOP-RULES block in text output; parity with go-FuSa
hara show --format json emits raw HARA JSON; parity with go-FuSa hara show -format json
hara show --format markdown emits Markdown table; parity with go-FuSa hara show -format markdown
gap-report commands (unece/iso26262/iec61508/iso21434) return exit 3 for unknown --format; parity with go-FuSa bad-format tests
cfusa init --docs generates starter safety documentation templates in docs/safety/; parity with go-FuSa init --docs
hara show --output <file> writes output to file instead of stdout; parity with go-FuSa TestRunHaraShow_WithOutputAndGaps
cfusa init returns exit 2 when all target files already exist and --force not set; parity with go-FuSa TestRunInit_AlreadyExists
cfusa init --module <path> flag accepted without error; parity with go-FuSa TestRunInit_WithNameAndModule
cfusa sas --prepared-by <name> includes preparer name in generated SAS document; parity with go-FuSa TestRunSas_PreparedBy
cfusa sas --output - writes to stdout instead of a file; parity with go-FuSa --output - convention
